name: smart-code-evaluation-engine
_comment: NPM Workspaces monorepo — frontend, backend/api, backend/worker, packages/db, packages/shared

scripts._comment_postinstall: Auto-runs after `npm install` — generates Prisma client and builds shared libs
scripts.postinstall: npx prisma generate --schema=packages/db/prisma/schema.prisma || true && npm run build -w @scee/shared
scripts._comment_dev: Launches API + Worker + Frontend concurrently for local development
scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,worker,web -c blue,magenta,green "npm run dev -w backend-api" "npm run dev -w backend-worker" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts._comment_openapi: Generates OpenAPI spec from running Fastify routes
scripts._comment_build: Full monorepo build (all packages in dependency order)
scripts.build: npm run build -w @scee/shared && npm run build -w @scee/db && npm run build -w backend-api && npm run build -w backend-worker && npm run build -w frontend
scripts._comment_build_frontend: VERCEL FRONTEND ONLY — builds shared libs + frontend (no backend)
scripts.build:frontend: npm run build -w @scee/shared && npm run build -w frontend
scripts._comment_build_vercel: VERCEL FULL-STACK — builds shared + DB + API + frontend (used by vercel.json)
scripts.build:vercel: npm run build -w @scee/shared && npm run build -w @scee/db && npm run build -w backend-api && npm run build -w frontend
